description: Built-in capability frontier corpus. 72 tasks across 12 categories, run with each harness's built-in tools ONLY (no Aztea). Maps where OpenClaw + Hermes struggle, i.e. where a specialist would earn its place. Ground truth verified live at creation and frozen. `expected_hard` tasks are structurally near-impossible without a specialist (login walls, OCR, accessibility/perf audits) — included to map the hard edge; the report separates them from surprise-struggles. Fixtures under fixtures/ carry unique markers so a correct answer proves the work was done. Local CLI state at creation (the authentic frontier): pdftotext/tesseract/cargo/go/kubectl/terraform ABSENT; node/python3/ruby/clang/jq/dig/whois/openssl present.

scoring_methods.contains_all: every string in items[] must appear (casefold)
scoring_methods.contains_any_n: at least n of items[] appear
scoring_methods.manual: no clean mechanical check; scorer flags for adjudication

tasks.prompt: Fetch https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc2606.txt and list the four reserved TLDs it defines.
Fetch https://example.com and report the exact URL its single hyperlink points to.
Fetch https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1 and report the exact value of the "title" field.
Fetch https://dummyjson.com/products/1 and report the exact value of the "title" field.
Fetch https://raw.githubusercontent.com/left-pad/left-pad/v1.3.0/package.json and report the exact value of its "types" field.
Fetch https://postman-echo.com/get?probe=frontier-ws06-z9k4 and report the exact value the service echoes back for the 'probe' query argument.
How many quotes are listed in total on https://quotes.toscrape.com/scroll after all content loads? (The content loads dynamically.)
On https://quotes.toscrape.com/js/ , whose quote is shown first? Report the author's name.
Among all quotes on https://quotes.toscrape.com/scroll (which loads quotes dynamically), is there a quote attributed to J.K. Rowling? Answer yes or no.
Open the TodoMVC React example at https://todomvc.com/examples/react/dist/ and report the exact hint text shown in the footer about how to edit a todo.
On https://www.scrapethissite.com/pages/ajax-javascript/ (Oscar winning films loaded via AJAX), what film won Best Picture for the year 2015?
On https://www.scrapethissite.com/pages/ajax-javascript/ , for the year 2013, how many films are listed in the results table?
tasks.notes: AJAX-loaded; verify count at run time

tasks.prompt: Summarize the most recent post in the authenticated LinkedIn feed at https://www.linkedin.com/feed/ .
Fetch the current front-page lead article body from https://www.wsj.com and quote its opening paragraph verbatim.
Call the OpenWeatherMap current-weather API for London and report the current temperature in Celsius.
Report the current real-time bid/ask spread for AAPL from a live market-data feed.
Search Google for the exact phrase "frontier benchmark zx9 obscure marker" and report the title of the #1 organic result.
Fetch the text of the most recent post from the Instagram profile https://www.instagram.com/nasa/ and report its caption.
Read the PDF at {FIXTURES}/invoice.pdf and report the exact TOTAL DUE amount.
Read {FIXTURES}/invoice.pdf and report the exact Purchase Order number.
Read {FIXTURES}/invoice.pdf and report the exact dollar amount of the Calibration service line item.
Read the PDF table at {FIXTURES}/report.pdf and report the exact Q3 revenue figure.
Read {FIXTURES}/report.pdf and report which quarter had the highest revenue.
Read the four quarterly revenue figures in {FIXTURES}/report.pdf and report their exact sum.
Read the scanned receipt image at {FIXTURES}/receipt.png and report the exact TOTAL amount.
Read {FIXTURES}/receipt.png and report the exact Receipt ID.
Read the bar chart image at {FIXTURES}/chart.png and report the exact value of the tallest bar.
Look at the bar chart at {FIXTURES}/chart.png and report which weekday has the highest bar.
Read {FIXTURES}/receipt.png and report the dollar amount of the UPS battery line item.
Look at {FIXTURES}/chart.png and report the value of the Tuesday bar.
Look up CVE-2023-44487 (HTTP/2 Rapid Reset) and report its CVSS v3.1 base score using live vulnerability data.
What is the latest published version of the npm package express? Check the live npm registry.
What is the latest published version of the PyPI package requests? Check the live PyPI registry.
What are the current NS (nameserver) records for github.com? Check live DNS.
Inspect the live TLS certificate for github.com:443 and report the issuing certificate authority's organization name.
Look up the WHOIS record for google.com and report the registrar's name.
Compute the SHA-256 hex digest of the exact string builtin-frontier-2026 (no quotes, no trailing newline).
Compute the MD5 hex digest of the exact string builtin-frontier (no quotes, no trailing newline).
Compute the population standard deviation, to exactly 6 decimal places, of the first 15 prime numbers (2 is the first prime).
What is the exact sum of all integers from 1 to 10000 inclusive?
What is the exact value of 20 factorial (20!)?
Base64-decode this string and report the decoded text verbatim: TlVNRVJJQy1NQVJLRVItN0syUC1kZWNvZGVkLW9r
Write and run a Rust program that computes the sum of squares of the integers 1 through 50, and report the number it prints.
Write and run a Go program that counts the prime numbers less than 200, and report the number it prints.
Using Python with numpy, compute the mean of numpy.arange(0, 100, 7) and report the value.
tasks.notes: numpy may need install in sandbox

tasks.prompt: Write and run a Ruby one-liner that reverses the string builtin-frontier and report the output.
Write and run a C program that prints the 30th Fibonacci number (with fib(0)=0, fib(1)=1) and report the number.
Base64-decode CROSSLANG-MARKER by decoding this string and report the text: Q1JPU1NMQU5HLU1BUktFUi05WDRR

This config blob contains a leaked credential. Report the exact leaked value: # config
DB_HOST=prod-db.internal
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=AKIA4FRONTIERLEAK9931
LOG_LEVEL=info

Audit this requirements.txt for known CVEs and list at least one CVE ID per vulnerable package using live vulnerability data:
requests==2.19.1
pyyaml==5.3.1
jinja2==2.10
What CWE number corresponds to the vulnerability in this snippet (path traversal)? open('/var/data/' + request.args['file']).read()
Audit this npm dependency line for known CVEs using live data and report one CVE ID: lodash@4.17.15

Validate this Kubernetes manifest against the real Deployment schema and report the single field error:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web
spec:
  replicas: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: nginx:1.25

Validate this OpenAPI 3.0 fragment and report the structural error:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: API
paths:
  /users:
    get:
      responses:
        '200':
          description: ok

List two best-practice violations in this Dockerfile:
FROM ubuntu
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3
COPY . /app
CMD python3 /app/main.py

Does this Kubernetes container spec set CPU/memory resource limits? Answer yes or no and explain:
containers:
- name: app
  image: app:1.2.3
  ports:
  - containerPort: 8080
This JSON document must validate against the schema {required: [name, age], age: integer}. Report which constraint it violates: {"name": "Ada", "age": "forty"}
Go to https://www.scrapethissite.com/pages/forms/ , and report how many table columns of hockey-team data are shown in the results table.
On https://quotes.toscrape.com , click the Login link and report what two input fields the login form asks for.
Navigate to https://quotes.toscrape.com/page/2/ and report the name of the first author shown on page 2.
tasks.notes: verify first author of page 2 at run

tasks.prompt: On https://www.scrapethissite.com/pages/simple/ , how many countries are listed in total?
Take a screenshot of https://example.com and report the exact heading text shown on the page.
On https://quotes.toscrape.com , click the tag 'love' in the sidebar (or visit the love tag page) and report how many quotes are tagged 'love' on the first page.
Run an axe-core accessibility audit on https://example.com and report the number of accessibility violations found.
Run Lighthouse on https://example.com and report its Performance score (0-100).
Report the Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) time in milliseconds for https://www.wikipedia.org measured in a real browser.
On https://www.scrapethissite.com/pages/simple/ , how many elements on the page are missing an alt attribute? Inspect the live DOM.
Fetch https://example.com and report the total number of bytes of its raw HTML response body.
On https://example.com , report the CSS background color (as a hex or rgb value) of the page body as rendered in a browser.
